title: チーム対抗戦後-スカウト

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day upon arriving at my office, I discover a
request from someone looking to join our team!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Apparently she watched our races the other day
and was inspired to join us!
